source_pr.title: *: move tests.
source_pr.body:
move some tests about fields and index max length.
@shenli @tiancaiamao PTAL

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select c from t1 union (select c from t2) order by c").Check(testkit.Rows("73", "930")) (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select c from t1 union (select c from t2) order by c").Check(testkit.Rows("73", "930")) (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select c from t1 union (select c from t2) order by c").Check(testkit.Rows("73", "930")) (executor/executor_test.go)
